reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and will also recommend the college to others.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is top-notch, but maintaining it in a government environment is always a barrier. Facilities of the hostel lack a bit in terms of hygiene, and all are maintained, but there is scope for improvement. Mess provides the food 3 times a day, which is a bit irregular sometimes. Sports and games are top-notch here. Football, cricket, table tennis, volleyball, and a few other sports are very common here, which are regularly played, and more sports are played during the college week.

reviews.review_heading: FAAMCH is the best college in the entire Assam.
reviews.review_text: There is a free Wi-Fi system all over the campus. There are various lecture halls, classrooms, and a central library containing many books. The hostel provides good food to students. There are various fields for sports, and many plants are also grown nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Good medical college to learn.
reviews.review_text: Medical labs are perfectly maintained, well-sanitized, and well-maintained. A lot of practical, with basic theory. The hostel is good, the quality of food is also good, first aid is always there, hygienic food, and a variety of foods. No sports for us, but you can play games in your free time.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied because of faculty members, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is so good and beautiful. Facilities are also good as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library all are available in our college. Facilities in our hostel are good. The quality of food is average in mess and canteen. Our college is favorable for sports as there are two playgrounds in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Sorted life, time management, and professional.
reviews.review_text: FAAMCH Barpeta offers expert facilities, modern lecture halls, labs, and a digital library. It has more than 500 beds in hospital to ensure clinical exposure. The campus has hostels, sports, and green spaces for holistic learning. Sports like football, volleyball, and cricket are also played here.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and the administration are good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is not good enough. The environment is good for study. The field is big enough, and one can play football and cricket in the field. The canteen is not hygiene enough. Medical facilities here are superb.

reviews.review_heading: Faamch barpeta! The only institute of Assam where you will never get disappointed.
reviews.review_text: All facilities like Wi-Fi; hostel; faculty quarter and other facilities like playgrounds are available. Apart from these library is also there where students can go issue books and also there are study rooms available up to 10 pm from morning 8 am where anyone can and study; which are air conditioning.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, placement, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough. After a series of inspection, the medical college was recognised by the Medical Council of India. Classrooms and labs are equipped with air-conditioners. The food served in the canteen was not good. Hostel rooms are fine, and there are 2 people residing in each room.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure. The placement average is good. Hostel facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: A big library and Wi-Fi are available. Air conditioning is available in every lecture hall. Hostel facilities and food in the mess are well appreciated. Books, including expensive ones, can be issued from the library with an ID card. The college canteen and hospital canteen are separately placed.

Sports and games facilities are also available. The quality of mess food is also good. Mess is also available for day scholar students.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for B.Pharma in Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and campus infrastructure are okay, but you will surely get the best lab facilities required. All the necessary instruments like HPLC, UV and IR instruments are present in laboratories for the course, and you can learn them and use them efficiently. They try to prepare you for industrial research as well. You can do your projects in the last semesters, which really give you an idea of industrial research.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, and students get laboratory experience with studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel quality is good with much space. There are many games to play in the hostel like badminton, table tennis, football, etc. Along with it, the hostel mess facility is also available. There are different buildings for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good with a great environment and great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the facilities required by the students in the department. The college provides lab, digital classroom, E-books and digital library. Quality of food served in the mess is good. The college provides games room as well as a TV room in our hostel. Basketball, volleyball and cricket court are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placements records. Faculty members tried their best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available, but in labs, sufficient stuff and apparatus are not available. Also, equipment for experiments come after semester. The library contains textbooks in a limited amount. Tech course and the diploma in engineering are recently started.

reviews.review_heading: The college management and faculty are good, but the labs are not good.

On campus, there are the library, computer lab, workshop, nice reception, large classrooms, 24-hour electricity, and water facility.

reviews.review_heading: A review about Ram-Eesh Institute.
reviews.review_text: The college has an open playground, canteen, an awesome green environment, well-furnished classrooms for the students. The labs are well-maintained, and the best part is the sports in this college is it contains the block for every sport out there. There is a well-maintained administration. It is a Wi-Fi campus. There is a hostel facility for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college, budget friendly.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility are very good, even canteen of hostel provide the best food, girls and boys hostel are separate and very near to college. Labs are well-equipped. College canteen fine. Well environment of college. College is surrounded by many trees, plants nursery etc.

reviews.review_heading: College was very helpful for those are come for study because college was helpful in study.
reviews.review_text: Facilities was very nice in my college I doing my B Farm from Ramesh Institute wide range books present in library Wi-Fi was also good and lab was very clear and helpful for us and the hostel facilities are very nice because the food in the hostels was very healthy and clean sports ground are available games was playing again period is also available for us.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ram-Eesh Group of Institutions.
reviews.review_text: There was a good Wi-Fi connection in every corner of this college. There was separate Wi-Fi on every floor. The laboratory was well-managed for every subject. There were air-conditioned classrooms. There was only one library in the entire college, which was a disadvantage for students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college if you want to gain knowledge.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities are available in our department, which ranges from well-maintained labs to a digital library to smart classrooms. There is also a Wi-Fi facility for us, but the usage limit per student is very less. Our college doesn't have a canteen, ground for games and a sports room. However, the hostel facility is good. The food available in the mess is average.

review_summary.college_name: Bhabha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: This college is very good for studies.

content.Placements: The placement here is pretty decent. The average package offered here is 3-5 lacs per annum, and the highest package offered here is 7-10 lacs per annum. Almost 70% of students get placed in well-known companies. The placement coordinator is a very helpful person.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent. Very quiet and nature-friendly surroundings with well-maintained facilities and up-to-date equipment are there. The class room is well equipped with Wi-Fi access for everyone; laboratories have well-updated technologies; and libraries have well-stocked books.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied by faculty and placement.

content.Placements: Most of the get placement. All the students get internships. The course makes students professional doctors. After completing your graduation, you will practice as a dentist or you can also go for academics. You can open your own clinic as well as hospital and do your own consultancy.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library. Quality of food is excellent. All the sports are organised every year. Medical facilities are very good. Quality of food in the canteen as well as in the mess is very good. Hostels are well maintained and all the facilities are available. The campus is too big.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college because faculty members are not good.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. There are no companies recruiting. Almost 100% of students got internships. There are no offers for internship students by this college. Students are very good at this college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are not available in our college. Classrooms are not good. The facilities in the hostel are not good. Food is not available in the hostel. Mess, canteen, and playgrounds are not available. There will be no games played on the grounds of this college. Water and other needed sources are not provided by the college management and the college does not provide any facilities.

individual_reviews.title: Our college has the best infrastructure and good facilities.

content.Placements: Till now, only 3 people have been selected for campus placement. They placed them in apprentice-based jobs like Sadar, with the highest salary package of 2.5 LPA, the lowest salary package of 1.5 LPA, and an average salary package of 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Cipla, Lupin, and Felix. Around 10% of our students received internships from Felix-related companies. They offer us the best packages for us.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are available in our department like Wi-Fi is good, labs are good but could be better. Our classrooms are clean and the library is too good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is excellent. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very good. They provide the best medical facilities as well as the best sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Average college. Placements never came in 2015. Overall my decision for admission was right.

content.Placements: Almost 90% students were there as the classes were full. In 2015 the lowest package was 20000 and average was 100000. As the highest was 200000 for mostly biharis students those who haven't got scholarship. There was no company for internship as every students go out for internship. But at the time of admission they have told for internship. But that was fake .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was not so good. As it was like just a box type blocks. Wi-fi was not available at that time labs were available. Workshop were also there. Mess was for hostel. And canteen for discollar. Library was of around 3000 sq ft and had appprox 10000 books at my time for engineering.

admission_overview.college_name: Bhabha University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection, Fee and Seats

paragraphs: Bhabha University admission 2025is both merit and entrance based. The University offers programmes at certificate, diploma, undergraduate, PG diploma, postgraduate and doctoral levels.Bhabha University BDS admissionis through NEET UG and the University accepts the rank ofNEET PGto offer admission in the MDS programme.Bhabha University BTech admissionis through JEE Main.

Candidates who want to take admission in the MBA programme must appear for CAT/XAT/ GMAT/ ATMA/ MAT/ CMAT.Bhabha University admissionsare also based on GATE andGPATrank and scores for MTech and MPharma programmes. Candidates who wish to take admission in any of theBhabha University coursesmust apply online for admission on theBhabha University website.

Bhabha University application process 2025is expected to begin soon. The University accepts the scores of various entrance examinations such as JEE Main, NEET UG, NEET PG, CMAT, GATE etc. to offer admission in specific courses. Admission to both the UG and PG programmes atBhabha Universityare merit and entrance based. Find below the key highlights forBhabha University admissions:

Bhabha University admission process 2025will begin soon. The University accepts the scores of qualifying as well as entrance examinations to offers admission in various programmes in its affiliated institutes.Bhabha University admissionis a multi-stage process. Candidates who wish to take admission in any of the programme in the affiliated institutions must fill the online enquiry form, check eligibility and must upload documents. If eligible, candidates must submit registration fees, fill admission form and finally receive admission slip. Given below isBhabha University admission process:
STEP 1: Bhabha University Application Process 2025

Canddates who wish to take admission in any of the programmes at Bhabha University must first fill out the enquiry form available on Bhabha University website: bhabhauniversity.edu.in, check the eligibility for the particular programme and upload all the necessary documents.
If candidates are eligible to apply for a particular programme, they must submit the registration fees, fill out the admission form and finally the admission slip will be generated.
STEP 2: Bhabha University Selection Criteria 2025

The next step ofBhabha University admission processis that candidates must appear for the entrance examinations for specific programmes. Candidates must appear for JEE Main,NEET UG, NEET PG,GATE, GPAT, CAT,CMATand other entrance tests according to the programme they have applied for duringBhabha University application process.
STEP 3: Bhabha University Counselling and Seat Allotment

Bhabha University then releases the merit list and the shortlisted candidates are required to appear for the counselling process and according to the rank and scores achieved in respective qualifying or entrance examination, Bhabha University allots seat to candidates. CheckBhabha University Cutoffs.
